title: Duplicate declaration of block: 'unnamedblk1'
body:
While compiling the following file:

```verilog
module top (input bit [31:0] regs [1]);
  Itf t1(.regs(regs));
endmodule

interface Itf (input bit [31:0] regs [1]);

  initial begin
    string instance_path = $sformatf("%m");
    $display("foo %s\n", instance_path);
  end

  bit [0:0] ppp;
  always_comb begin
    foreach (regs [index] ) begin
      ppp[index] = 1;
    end
  end

endinterface
```

By running `verilator --lint-only test.sv`

`Verilator 4.219 devel rev v4.216-111-ge52a4ac7` from the master.

I am getting this error:

```
%Error: test.sv:14:5: Duplicate declaration of block: 'unnamedblk1'
                    : ... In instance top
   14 |     foreach (regs [index] ) begin
      |     ^~~~~~~
        test.sv:7:11: ... Location of original declaration
    7 |   initial begin
      |           ^~~~~
%Error: test.sv:14:5: Duplicate declaration of CELLINLINE 'unnamedblk1': 'unnamedblk1'
   14 |     foreach (regs [index] ) begin
      |     ^~~~~~~
        test.sv:7:11: ... Location of original declaration
    7 |   initial begin
      |           ^~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
```

The issue disappear if one of the `begin ... end` blocks have a label.

I am running:

`Linux linux-sydi 5.16.8-1-default #1 SMP PREEMPT Thu Feb 10 11:31:59 UTC 2022 (5d1f5d2) x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux`

Willing to assist debugging this issue.
